stories.title: Curry Confirmed to Return Sunday vs Rockets

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
STEPH IS BACK. 🏀

Curry confirmed to return Sunday vs. Houston after missing 27 straight games.

Two scrimmages. Both looked like vintage Steph.

Kerr: "He looks like Steph Curry."

The Warriors just became dangerous again. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Warriors were a lottery team without Steph. With him?

A NIGHTMARE matchup in the Play-In. 👀

GSW: 23-16 with Curry. 13-25 without.

One player. Entirely different team.

Sunday vs. Houston can't come fast enough.

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #NBA

article.headline: Stephen Curry Cleared to Return Sunday — Warriors' Playoff Survival Is On

stories.title: West No. 1 Race — OKC 61-16 vs SA 59-18: 5 Games to Go

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
OKC leads SA by 2 games with 5 left.

But the Spurs own the tiebreaker. 4-1. ⚡

SA closes with FOUR straight home games.
OKC has THREE road games vs. playoff teams.

The West No. 1 seed is NOT decided. Not even close.

#HoopHeroes #Thunder #Spurs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Spurs are 23-2 since February 1.

OKC is 61-16. Both are elite. But the schedule favors San Antonio.

Hot take: if the Spurs win the No. 1 seed, it's one of the greatest late-season runs in NBA history. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #Thunder

article.headline: West No. 1 Seed Race: OKC vs. Spurs — Five Games Left and Nothing Is Settled

stories.title: Wembanyama's MVP Case Hits a New Level

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Wemby is No. 1 on the Kia MVP Ladder. 👀

His odds: +225 (was +1000 a month ago).

Back-to-back 40+/15+ games — youngest player in NBA history to do it.

SGA has 88 first-place votes but WEMBY is the story of the final week.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #MVP

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
SGA will probably win the MVP. The voters are locked in.

But the BEST player on the court most nights this season?

Wembanyama. No argument. 🏀🔥

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBA

article.headline: Wembanyama Tops the MVP Ladder — Can He Flip the Vote in the Final Week?

stories.title: Pistons on the Doorstep of No. 1 East Seed

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Magic number: 1. 👀

The Detroit Pistons are ONE step from clinching No. 1 in the East.

Their last No. 1 seed? 2007.

Two seasons ago they were 14-68.

The greatest turnaround in NBA history is almost complete. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Pistons #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
The Pistons are proving they don't need Cade to win.

Duren. Jenkins. A deep, disciplined roster.

Detroit is the East's most dangerous team entering the playoffs. 👀

#HoopHeroes #Pistons #NBA

article.headline: Pistons on the Doorstep: Detroit Is One Win From Their First No. 1 East Seed Since 2007

stories.title: Rockets Clinch — Houston Is Officially In

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
HOUSTON IS BACK. 🚀

The Rockets officially clinched a playoff spot.

Alperen Sengun since March 18: 24.9 PPG / 9.3 RPG / 7.1 APG on 62.1% shooting.

That's not a rotation player. That's a SUPERSTAR. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Rockets #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
Nobody wants to see the Rockets in Round 1.

Sengun is unstoppable right now.

Houston just clinched — and they might be the West's biggest wild card. 👀

#HoopHeroes #Rockets #NBA

article.headline: Houston Rockets Clinch Playoff Berth — Sengun's Surge Is Carrying Them In

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Luka Doncic crossed 15,000 career points.

Third-youngest in NBA history — behind only LeBron and KD. 🏀

35.8 PPG over his last 21 games. The Lakers 16-5 in that stretch.

This is not a peak. It might be the beginning. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Lakers #Luka

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
West Play-In is SET. ⚡

No. 7 Phoenix vs. No. 8 Portland
No. 9 LA Clippers vs. No. 10 Golden State

Eight days until tip-off.

Now that Curry's confirmed back?

Don't sleep on the Warriors. 👀

#HoopHeroes #NBAPlayoffs #NBA
